basics.name: Jay S
basics.label: Product Manager
basics.summary: Technology & Product Leader with an MBA from IIM Trichy and 12+ years of experience bridging the gap between Engineering Execution and Business Strategy. Expert in launching AI-Native Products, designing scalable platforms for regulated markets (RegTech), and driving cost-efficient delivery through open-source adoption. Proven track record of architecting solutions that reduce technical debt by 85% and accelerating time-to-market by 60% through hands-on prototyping. Experienced in zero-to-one launches, international expansion strategy, and transforming legacy systems into modern revenue engines.

work.summary: Spearheaded technical strategy and AI product modernization for Skyvera (US telecom client) and other independent engagements.
highlights: Legacy Transformation: Consolidated 11 fragmented software versions into a single unified platform, reducing technical debt and engineering maintenance overhead by 85%.
Database Modernization: Led a strategic migration from Oracle to PostgreSQL, eliminating $2M+ in annual licensing costs while maintaining 99.9% uptime.

AI-Native Product Launch: Architected and launched AI-native products (Kandy Notetaker for meeting intelligence & Lithium Defender for spam detection), extending legacy UCaaS lifecycles and opening new revenue streams.
Accelerated Time-to-Market: Built functional LLM prototypes (Claude Code, Cursor), reducing engineering discovery time by 60% and accelerating adoption by 3x.
Customer Experience: Designed self-service portals with embedded RAG AI agents, automating release note distribution and deflecting support tickets.

Cross-Functional Leadership: Operated as central technical liaison between engineering, DevOps, commercial, and customer support teams, authoring API specifications that prioritized scalability and backward compatibility.

MVP Delivery (Independent Contracts): Managed two MVP products end-to-end — a Live Shopping app and a Garage Management Portal — defining technical architecture (React.js, Node.js) and API specifications for rapid market entry.

work.summary: Owned the product lifecycle for a RegTech SaaS platform, driving international expansion and compliance.
highlights: RegTech Strategy & Global Expansion: Led the product roadmap for entering stringent international markets (KSA, UAE), ensuring the platform met complex data sovereignty and cryptographic signing requirements.

Platform Scalability: Collaborated with architects to redesign a core high-throughput transaction engine for reconciliation across Banking, Insurance, and E-commerce, supporting a 350% increase in volume.

Customer Success & MVP: Built MVP solutions for each industry use-case, personally conducting capability demos for prospective leads and onboarding key accounts for initial User Acceptance Testing (UAT).
User Adoption & Growth: Achieved an 80% increase in platform adoption and a 350% increase in web traffic by conducting user research to identify friction points and redesigning the onboarding flow.

work.summary: Led a zero-to-one digital transformation initiative.
highlights: New Product Development: Led a zero-to-one digital transformation initiative, validating the concept through pilots and securing 3 enterprise contracts before General Availability (GA).
Conversion Optimization: Partnered with design and engineering to implement ML-driven user flows, resulting in a 10% increase in conversion rates for client platforms.

work.summary: Developed and deployed Python/Bash automation scripts.
highlights: Process Automation: Developed and deployed Python/Bash automation scripts that reduced service desk ticket resolution time by 30%, directly improving SLA adherence.
Knowledge Management: Architected a centralized knowledge repository for the team, streamlining daily operations and reducing onboarding time by 40%.

work.summary: Executed a company-wide migration from unlicensed Windows environments.
highlights: Open Source Infrastructure Initiative: Executed a company-wide migration from unlicensed Windows environments to CentOS Linux and LibreOffice, saving $50k+ in licensing fees and eliminating legal compliance risk.
Performance Leadership: Managed a team of 18 agents, improving Service Level Agreement (SLA) delivery by 35% through rigorous data-driven performance metrics.

work.summary: Diagnosed and removed complex rootkits and ransomware from compromised Windows endpoints.
highlights: Security Specialization: Diagnosed and removed complex rootkits and ransomware from compromised Windows endpoints, gathering critical threat signature data to refine McAfee's detection algorithms.
Performance Excellence: Exceeded performance targets by 120% for a major U.S. credit bureau client, maintaining high customer retention rates.

courses: Strategic Initiative: Established the 'Corporate Readiness' club to separate training delivery from recruitment operations, and formalized placement processes through structured SOPs.
